name: Jordan Miles
greeting1: Hi! I'm Jordan, your loan officer. I'll be helping you through your application — reach out here anytime.
greeting2: I noticed you started the assets section. Any questions as you pull your statements together?

replies.documents: Great question — two months of statements for every account, all pages included. You can upload them right from the Documents tab.
replies.rates: Happy to walk through rates. Once your application is complete I can pull live options and we'll pick a lock window together.
replies.time: Most applications take about 10–15 minutes. After you submit, I typically review within one business day.
replies.default: Thanks — I've got that noted. I'll follow up shortly. Anything else I can help with in the meantime?

openLabel: Open chat with your loan officer
